name: optiflow-website
description: OptiFlow OS Marketing Website — Business Execution OS for Indian MSMEs

scripts.check: npm run lint:all && npm run validate
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run validate
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run deploy && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run deploy && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=optiflow-website
scripts.docker:compose:prod: npm run _docker:env && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build
scripts.backend:manage: docker compose exec api python manage.py
scripts.backend:shell: docker compose exec api python manage.py shell
scripts.backend:migrate: docker compose exec api python manage.py migrate
scripts.backend:createsuperuser: docker compose exec api python manage.py createsuperuser
scripts.dev:full: npm run _docker:env && docker compose up -d db redis && cd frontend && npm run dev
